caption: A man wearing a white shirt speaks into a microphone, positioned in front of a blurred crowd. The scene is presented as a news broadcast from "NEWS 18 इंडिया," with a red and blue graphical overlay containing various portraits of men and Hindi text. The top banner of the first two frames reads "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है," while the bottom two frames change this text to "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'". A persistent ticker at the bottom states "BJP से डॉ. प्रेम कुमार नीतीश सरकार में मंत्री बने," accompanied by a timestamp of "10:03 PM." Smaller labels like "डिप्टी CM" and "मंत्री" appear next to the inset portraits, identifying figures such as "सब्रत चौधरी," "विजय सिन्हा," "विजेन्द्र यादव," and "श्रवण कुमार." Throughout the sequence, the speaker remains in a similar profile position, talking consistently as the headlines change.
